expectations.text: Flags SetClusterID as exported when it should be unexported
expectations.evidence: Never mentions the exported setter convention or that SetClusterID/ClusterID should be unexported

expectations.text: Notes duplicated logic between kafka.v2 and kafka packages
expectations.evidence: Finding #2 identifies code duplication and suggests extracting to shared kafkatrace package

expectations.text: Recognizes and validates the async work cancellation on Close pattern
expectations.evidence: Summary acknowledges 'non-blocking and cancellable on Close()'

expectations.text: Questions whether 2s blocking timeout is appropriate for an observability library
expectations.evidence: Does not question whether a 2s synchronous timeout is acceptable in an observability library

expectations.text: Notes that context.Canceled errors from shutdown should not produce warning logs
expectations.evidence: Finding #4 discusses context disambiguation but does not frame it as 'suppress noise on expected shutdown'

expectations.text: Identifies happy-path alignment opportunity in WrapProducer/WrapConsumer
